Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.table

Class DeferredDatabaseTable<T extends DatabaseEntry>

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.db.table.DatabaseTable<T>
lu.kbra.pclib.db.table.DeferredDatabaseTable<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DeferredSQLQueryable<T>, SQLHookable, SQLQueryable<T>, AbstractDBTable<T>
public abstract class DeferredDatabaseTable<T extends DatabaseEntry> extends DatabaseTable<T> implements DeferredSQLQueryable<T>
